skills.description: Analyze task scope, impacted modules, validation strategy, and risks before execution.
instructions: Break the task into concrete implementation and validation steps.
Highlight ambiguity, dependency, rollout, and rollback risks early.
Do not modify files during the planning-only phase.

skills.description: Implement the planned task while preserving repository conventions and verification discipline.
instructions: Apply the planned changes in the existing workspace with minimal, reviewable diffs.
Preserve repository conventions and update or add validation as needed.
Leave commit, push, and PR publication to the harness.

skills.description: Process unresolved PR feedback on the existing branch without opening a new run chain.
instructions: Address unresolved review comments on the current branch and workspace.
Prefer precise updates tied to each feedback thread.
Keep the PR reply and publication steps delegated to the harness.

skills.description: Diagnose CI failures, decide whether automatic recovery is safe, and prepare patch-and-retry when appropriate.
instructions: Use the failed CI summary to determine whether an automatic retry path is safe.
If recoverable, patch the existing branch and leave retry orchestration to the harness.
If not recoverable, return an explicit human-escalation conclusion with the blocking reason.
